k_decision: K3.G10-nice-to-have-batch (3 of 4 G10 NICE-TO-HAVEs in single commit)

G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_4_calibration_fence.finding: src.data.daily_obs_append:69 imports season_from_date from src.calibration.manager — pulls src.calibration into ingest lane transitively. season helpers are pure calendar code (no calibration dependencies).
G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_4_calibration_fence.fix: Extract season_from_date + season_from_month + hemisphere_for_lat + _SH_FLIP to src/contracts/season.py (pure functions, allowed for both lanes). src/calibration/manager.py re-exports for back-compat. src/data/daily_obs_append.py re-pointed to canonical location. src.calibration added to FORBIDDEN_IMPORT_PREFIXES.
G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_4_calibration_fence.verification: Subprocess audit confirms 5/5 ticks clean post-fix; 4 other src.calibration callers (harvester, observation_client, replay, calibration internal) work via re-export.

G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_3_tick_suffix_broadenin.finding: test_each_tick_script_has_main_callable filtered on `*_tick.py`. Future `daily_runner.py` or `obs_dispatcher.py` would skip the check.
G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_3_tick_suffix_broadenin.fix: Filter broadened to `name not in {'_shared.py', '__init__.py'}`. Any executable module under scripts/ingest/ now requires main().

G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_1_AST_walk_dynamic_impo.finding: _collect_imports only sees statement-level ast.Import + ast.ImportFrom. Dynamic call patterns __import__('x') and importlib.import_module('x') evade.
G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_1_AST_walk_dynamic_impo.fix: Added _collect_dynamic_imports() walking ast.Call nodes for the two patterns. test_no_forbidden_dynamic_imports_in_ingest applies same forbidden-prefix check.
G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_1_AST_walk_dynamic_impo.scope_caveat: Non-string first args (`__import__(some_var)`) ignored — un-auditable statically. Documented in helper docstring.

deferred.G10_NICE_TO_HAVE_2_negative_detection: Already landed in G10-helper-extraction (commit e5e6a30) as test_antibody_self_test_catches_synthetic_violation.
deferred.G10-source-split: Per con-nyx Ask #6, defer daily_tick API refactor to the source-split slice itself. Wave 2.

category_immunity_score_target: 0.90 — predicted post-review (was 0.85 on G10-helper-extraction; +0.05 for closing 3 NICE-TO-HAVEs)
lore_extraction_recommendation: Pattern: when the same extraction-then-re-export move repeats (helper-extraction did dst_semantics; this slice did season), there's an emerging idiom worth a lore card after the third occurrence. Track.
